title: Imago Vera
description: A true image. Flesh, shadow, and breath.

title: Icon Picta
description: Brushstrokes declare themselves. No one mistakes it for a person.

title: Simulacrum Marmoreum
description: Stone, obviously stone. Yet the eyes follow.

title: Effigies Cerea
description: Every pore rendered. Every hair implanted. Still — wax.

title: Vultus Syntheticus
description: A face that never breathed. Generated in seconds.

title: Automaton
description: Motors behind the smile. The jaw moves when you move.
